product.name: WORKPRO 8 Inch High Leverage Diagonal Pliers, Wire Cutters Heavy Duty in CRV Steel, Diagonal Cutters for Cutting Wires
features: Strong & Sturdy Steel Construction: Made from heat-treated chrome vanadium steel, these diagonal wire cutters offer strength and durability. The black polished finish, combined with a clear electrophoretic coating, ensures excellent corrosion resistance.
Precision Cutting: The beveled edge design allows for more precise cuts, making it especially suitable for working in tight spaces or tasks requiring fine handling. Cuts steel wire up to 5 mm

High Leverage Design: Featuring a high pivot point and long handles, these wire cutters provide better leverage and increased cutting power. They save 30% more effort compared to regular cutting pliers.
Ergonomic Comfort Handles: The TPR handles offer a comfortable, non-slip grip, reducing hand fatigue and increasing control during extended use.

Extensive Uses: These 8-inch diagonal cutting pliers are ideal for cutting copper, brass, iron, aluminum, and steel wires, as well as cables and small fasteners. A must-have tool for your toolbox and household tasks.
